symptom_summary: impl-spec-test passed 4 of 5 ADR048 FEATs with pass_with_revisions but missed 4 CRITICAL and 5 HIGH findings including empty FEAT documents, wrong upstream refs, duplicate YAML keys, and empty state model labels
problem_description: After the full ADR048 SSOT chain review, a human reviewer found that impl-spec-test passed FEAT-001 (v4), FEAT-002 (v2), FEAT-003, FEAT-004 (v2), and FEAT-005 (v2) all with pass_with_revisions verdicts, yet missed these critical issues: (1) C1: All 5 FEAT documents are empty 13-line skeletons with only YAML frontmatter and a title line - impl-spec-test loaded the FEAT doc but only checked status field, never verified body content exists. (2) C3: IMPL-003/004/005 all reference TECH-001/ARCH-001/API-001 which belong to FEAT-001's domain (formal publication) - impl-spec-test never validates that upstream refs point to domain-appropriate documents. (3) H2: IMPL-002 has duplicate non_goals YAML keys - impl-spec-test uses yaml.safe_load which silently takes the last value, discarding the first 4 items. (4) H3: IMPL-001/002 skip TASK-003 and TASK-006 with no explanation - impl-spec-test never validates task numbering continuity. (5) H4: IMPL-001 body has empty state model labels (only arrows, no state names) - impl-spec-test extracts from State Model Snapshot section but never validates body section quality. Root cause: impl-spec-test review dimensions (functional_logic, data_modeling, user_journey, api_contract, etc.) check internal IMPL coherence but never cross-validate upstream document quality, domain appropriateness of refs, or YAML structural integrity. The functional_logic dimension only checks impl.main_sequence, impl.completion_signals, and feat.title - but NOT feat._body length. No dimension checks cross-artifact ref validity.
upstream_refs: ssot/adr/ADR-048-SSOT-与双链测试接入-Droid-Missions-的统一治理架构.md
